vigenere.name: Vigenere Cipher
vigenere.description: A polyalphabetic substitution cipher that uses a keyword to shift each letter. Each letter of the key determines a different Caesar shift.

affine.name: Affine Cipher
affine.description: A monoalphabetic cipher where each letter is mapped using a linear function. Requires 'a' to be coprime with 26.

playfair.name: Playfair Cipher
playfair.description: A digraph substitution cipher using a 5×5 key matrix. J is merged with I. Encrypts pairs of letters using row, column, or rectangle rules.

hill.name: Hill Cipher
hill.description: A polygraphic substitution cipher based on linear algebra. Uses matrix multiplication to encrypt blocks of letters. Key matrix must be invertible mod 26.

enigma.name: Enigma Machine
enigma.description: A simulation of the WWII German Enigma cipher machine with 3 rotors, a reflector (Reflector B), and a plugboard. Encryption = Decryption (symmetric).
enigma.plugboard: Plugboard (letter pairs, space-separated e.g. "AB CD EF")
enigma.inputLabel: Input Text (same settings for encrypt & decrypt)
enigma.warning: ⚠ Use same rotor settings and positions to decrypt
enigma.selfInverse: Enigma is self-inverse: use same settings to decrypt

history.title: Operation History
history.noHistoryDesc: Encrypt or decrypt something using any cipher tab above. Results will be logged here automatically.
history.envHint: Make sure NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are set in .env.local
